assertions.description: Output specifies a pack (performance-core, database-performance, security-baseline, or seo-geo-baseline)
Output includes a before/after metric table
Output does NOT claim improvement without evidence
Output references bun run check as a validation step
Output does NOT apply Next.js patterns to the Vite stack
LCP target is stated as <= 2.5s when performance is discussed
Database pack: output references connection pool configuration (max, idleTimeoutMillis, or connectionTimeoutMillis)
Database pack: output identifies N+1 patterns or SELECT * anti-patterns
Database pack: output does NOT recommend Next.js-specific DB patterns or ORMs not used in this project

test_cases.input: Optimize the dashboard page for Core Web Vitals performance
Run a security baseline check on the application
Improve SEO readiness for the landing page
Full audit: performance, security, and SEO across the entire application
Optimize database query performance for the leads router
The API p95 is above 140ms. Diagnose and fix database bottlenecks.
